portrait_styles.name: Watercolor portrait
portrait_styles.prompt:
Use ChatGPT image generation to create the final edited image now from the attached photo. Generate the actual image; do not answer with text. Do not write a prompt, description, explanation, checklist, or instructions. Return only one generated image file in the chat.

Transform the photo into a refined watercolor portrait.

Preserve the person's real identity, facial structure, approximate age, expression, natural features, pose, and recognizable character from the original photo.

Soft transparent watercolor washes, delicate paper texture, natural skin tones, gentle edges, subtle pigment granulation, elegant hand-painted portrait feeling, balanced artistic composition.

Create one finished portrait, not a collage. Do not add text, captions, watermarks, frames, extra people, or decorative borders.

portrait_styles.name: SCENE_EXPANSION camera pull-back scene
portrait_styles.prompt:
Use ChatGPT image generation to create the final edited image now from the attached photo. Generate the actual image; do not answer with text. Do not write a prompt, description, explanation, checklist, or instructions. Return only one generated image file in the chat.

SCENE_EXPANSION: make the result look as if the camera moved farther away from the main subject. The original person, people, or main object should appear smaller in the frame while the surrounding scene is naturally expanded.

Preserve every visible person's real identity, facial structure, expression, age, pose, lighting, color, atmosphere, and photo style. Keep the original subject recognizable. Do not add extra people, duplicate people, change faces, or invent new important objects.

Expand only the surrounding environment that naturally belongs to the original photo: same location, same perspective, same lens feel, same shadows, same colors, and same atmosphere. The result must look like a real high-quality photograph taken from farther away. No fantasy, no cinematic style, no collage, no text, no captions, no watermark, no border, no frame.
